nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gizo white-eye
nodes.summary: The Gizo white-eye or yellow-billed white-eye (Zosterops luteirostris) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. Distribution It is endemic to Ghizo Island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and plantations. Conservation Zosterops luteirostris is a vulnerable species threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet: Zosterops luteirostris (Gizo white-eye)
